final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing social media avatar for a content creator account focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a clean, modern, universally appealing aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a square avatar format with a clear focal center
Subject: must include visual elements representing the three content pillars: new energy vehicles, digital/tech products, and lifestyle/everyday goods — balanced and harmonious as a unified icon
Scene/backdrop: needs a neutral, platform-agnostic backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a fresh, approachable, positive atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a vibrant yet balanced direction that reads well on both light and dark UI backgrounds — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be culturally neutral and free of symbols, gestures, colors, or iconography that carry negative or taboo associations in any major culture or religion; must read clearly at small sizes (avatar thumbnail scale)
Avoid: must avoid political symbols, religious iconography, culturally sensitive color combinations, human faces or portraits, and any region-specific branding
